languages.text: "Как ты это делаешь? Как ты заставляешь труп говорить своим голосом?"

traits.locale_text: "Как ты это делаешь? Как ты заставляешь труп говорить своим голосом?"
"Как ты это делаешь? Как ты заставляешь труп говорить своим голосом?"

languages.text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"
languages.original_text: "Как ты это делаешь? Как ты заставляешь труп говорить своим голосом?"

traits.locale_text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"
"How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"
"How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"

languages.text: "Wie machst du das? Wie bringst du diesen Leichnam dazu, mit deiner Stimme zu sprechen?"
languages.original_text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"

languages.text: "Comment faites-vous cela ? Comment fais-tu parler ce cadavre avec ta voix ?"
languages.original_text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"

languages.text: "你是怎么做到的？你是怎么让这具尸体用你的声音说话的？"
languages.original_text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"

languages.text: "¿Cómo estás haciendo esto? ¿Cómo haces que este cadáver hable con tu voz?".
languages.original_text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"

languages.text: 「どうやっているんだ？この死体にどうやってあなたの声でしゃべらせているの？"
languages.original_text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"

languages.text: "Bunu nasıl yapıyorsun? Bu cesedi kendi sesinle nasıl konuşturuyorsun?"
languages.original_text: "How are you doing this? How are you making this corpse speak with your voice?"
